CodeIssue.Title: java.io.File
CodeIssue.Description: This functionality acts as an entry point for external data and the code should be manually checked to ensure the data obtained is correctly validated and/or sanitised. Additionally, carefull checks/sanitisation should be applied in any situation where the user may be able to control or affect the filename.

CodeIssue.Title: Public Class Not Declared as Final
CodeIssue.Description: The class is not declared as final as per OWASP recommendations. It is considered best practice to make classes final where possible and practical (i.e. It has no classes which inherit from it). Non-Final classes can allow an attacker to extend a class in a malicious manner. Manually inspect the code to determine whether or not it is practical to make this class final.
CodeIssue.CodeLine: public class BlindSendFileAssignment implements AssignmentEndpoint, Initializable {
